# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URLS', defaultValue: 'https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.12.0/commons-lang3-3.12.0.jar\nhttps://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/org/apache/commons/commons-io/2.11.0/commons-io-2.11.0.jar', description: 'Newline-separated list of artifact URLs to download. Supports HTTP/S, S3 pre-signed URLs, Artifactory direct links.')
        string(name: 'TARGET_SERVERS', defaultValue: '
